title: 11 Herbal Infusions to Help HIV/AIDS Patients with Loss of Appetite
description: Centella asiatica tinctures may help with loss of appetite due to its properties and constituents, such as triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help soothe the digestive system and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders that may lead to loss of appetite. The saponins in Centella asiatica have been shown to stimulate appetite and improve digestion by increasing the secretion of digestive enzym...
